talents.name: Stone Fragment Tide
talents.desc: For 8s after you cast Cracking Echo, each Basic Attack pulls a target between 8 and 20 meters away toward you. The same target cannot be pulled again within 3s.

talents.name: Power Conversion
talents.desc: Armor 3300

talents.name: Life Suppress
talents.desc: You gain the Suppress Expertise effect.

talents.name: Weakness Strike
talents.desc: When dealing DMG, Basic Attacks have a fixed 10% chance to trigger Weakness Strike once.

talents.name: Enhanced Weak Point Strike
talents.desc: Weakness Strike's fixed trigger chance +10%.

talents.name: Block Recovery
talents.desc: Successful Block restores 1% of your HP and 2 Rage. This can only occur once per second. Triggering Lucky Block restores 2% of your HP and 4 Rage. This can only occur once per second.

talents.name: Countercrush
talents.desc: A successful Block triggers a Countercrush, once per second. On a Lucky Block, randomly triggers 1 to 3 Countercrush, once per second.

talents.name: Sandgrip
talents.desc: After casting Sandgrip, gains 10% Versatility for 10s.

talents.name: Healing Sands
talents.desc: Max HP +10%

talents.name: Fortune Bastion
talents.desc: During Brave Bastion, you can Block Magic Damage.

talents.name: Slam Shelter
talents.desc: A successful hit with Shield Bash reduces the target's DMG dealt to you by 3% for 10s, stacking up to 3 times.

talents.name: Resolute Breath
talents.desc: While shielded, use Basic Attack midair to slam down, detonating the shield and dealing damage equal to 30% max HP to nearby enemies.

talents.name: Smash Support
talents.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Shield granted by Shield Bash by 30%.

talents.name: Sandy Shelter
talents.desc: During Stoneform, every 20 Rage gained triggers Sandy Shelter.

talents.name: Shield Combo
talents.desc: Basic Attacks have a fixed 5% chance to trigger Shield Combo upon dealing DMG. Each 1% Mastery grants an extra 0.2% chance.

talents.name: Breath of Stone
talents.desc: Each Sand Crystal consumed reduces the CD of Stoneform by 1s.

talents.name: Elemental Harmony
talents.desc: While shielded, Magic Damage and Wind DMG you take are -25% and 50% respectively.

talents.name: Shield Echo
talents.desc: During Sandshroud, adding a shield to yourself via Shield Bash triggers Shield Echo.

talents.name: Shattering Rageblow
talents.desc: When dealing DMG, Granite Fury has a 20% chance to allow your next Basic Attack to evolve into Rageblow. Each 2% Luck adds 1% chance. After casting Rageblow, increases Block DMG Reduction by 10% for 10s.

talents.name: Fang of the Alpha
talents.desc: DMG Reduction vs. Bosses +8%

talents.name: Survival Instinct
talents.desc: When HP falls below 30%, triggers Survival Instinct, once every 60s.

talents.name: Shadow Veil
talents.desc: Each enemy within 3 meters increases your Block chance by 3%, up to 15%. (Doubles the effect against Elite or stronger enemies.) Remains unchanged when Earthfort Spec is active. If Block Spec is activated, the effect becomes: Every enemy within 3 meters increases Block DMG Reduction by 1%, up to 5%. (Doubles the effect against Elite or stronger enemies.)

talents.name: Valiant Fury
talents.desc: When Enraged, you gain 30% bonus Armor, decreasing by 5% per second.

talents.name: Group Suppress
talents.desc: Each enemy within 3 meters enhances the effectiveness of Suppress by 3%, up to 15%. This effect is doubled against Elite or stronger enemies.

talents.name: Rage Awakening
talents.desc: Consuming Rage has a chance to enter Enraged state for 5s. The more Rage you consume, the higher the chance. Each Rage increases the chance by 1%.

talents.name: Block Spec
talents.desc: Replaces Special Attack with Countercrush, and enhances the ability. When Lucky Block triggers, increases Block DMG Reduction by 10%. Try to keep Countercrush active as much as possible. While it's active, part of incoming DMG can be blocked. High Luck allows parry to yield various buffs.

talents.name: Earthfort Spec
talents.desc: Further enhances the ability to use Shield Bash. Each additional enemy hit increases the damage dealt by Shield Bash by 30%, up to 150%. When attacked, increases All-Element Resistance by 0.6% for 4s, stacking up to 10 times. Each 1% Mastery increases this effect by 2%. Maintain shield uptime whenever possible. Besides reducing incoming damage, the shield also applies certain effects when active.

talents.name: Resonant Domain
talents.desc: Cracking Echo generates a Sandfield that lasts for 5s.

talents.name: Sandstone Rewind
talents.desc: When Rageblow deals DMG, it reduces the CD of Brave Bastion by 3s.

talents.name: Sandstone Shock
talents.desc: During Brave Bastion, casting Countercrush or Granite Fury triggers Sand Crystal Shock.

talents.name: Block Blessing
talents.desc: A successful Block grants a fixed 30% chance for your next Granite Fury cast to consume no Sand Crystals. This effect can occur up to once every 3s.

talents.name: Fury Shelter
talents.desc: While Enraged, Max HP +20%.

talents.name: Enraged Suppress
talents.desc: While Enraged, Suppress effect +50%.

talents.name: Enrage Delay
talents.desc: When Strength reaches 500, extends the duration of Enraged by 1 second.

talents.name: Sandstone Revival
talents.desc: For each 1 Sand Crystal consumed, restore 1% of Max HP.

talents.name: Enrage Expansion
talents.desc: While Enraged, Attack Speed +8%.

talents.name: Rage Burst improvement
talents.desc: The charge count of Rage Burst +1. While Enraged, Rage Burst and Terra Sunder become instant cast.

talents.name: Star Fury
talents.desc: Increases Star Shatter and Starfall DMG by 30%, and guarantees Enraged status.

talents.name: Stone Domain
talents.desc: throughout the duration of Sandshroud, being attacked reduces the attack speed of enemy targets within a 5 meter radius by 30% for 3s. throughout the duration of Sandshroud, Armor of allies within an 8 meter radius +10%.

talents.name: Amplified Earthfort
talents.desc: Upon the triggering of Weakness Strike, gains Amplified Earthfort.

talents.name: Boulder Shield
talents.desc: During Stoneform, reduces all DMG taken by 10%.

talents.name: Shield Bash
talents.desc: Enhances Shield effectiveness by 10%. During Sandshroud, additionally enhances Shield effectiveness by 10%.

talents.name: Recovery
talents.desc: Each successful hit of Expertise Skill or Special Attack increases Strength by 1% in 5s. The effect stacks up to 10 times. With 10 stacks, increases Strength by 10% for 8s. During this effect, the next Expertise Skill heals you for 20% of the DMG dealt, yet no additional Strength stacks can be gained.

talents.name: Starfall
talents.desc: For every 20 Sand Crystals consumed, Star Shatter evolves into Starfall.

talents.name: Rock Master
talents.desc: Casting Starfall grants Rock Master. Rock Master: For 15s, Basic Attack evolves into 1 Rupture, and Rage Burst evolves into 1 Terra Sunder. When Rock Master activates, grants 10% Rock Bonus for 10s.

talents.name: Shatter Strike
talents.desc: When Star Shatter or Starfall defeats a target, Star Shatter immediately recovers 1 charge.

talents.name: Enraged Rupture
talents.desc: While Enraged, Rupture is bound to trigger Weakness Strike.

talents.name: Star Shatter Pursuit
talents.desc: Star Shatter and Starfall deals additionally 200% DMG to targets with current HP less than or equal to 35%.

talents.name: Great Rock Master
talents.desc: Casting Stoneform​ grants Rock Master: For 15s, Basic Attack evolves into 1 Rupture, and Rage Burst evolves into 1 Terra Sunder.

talents.name: Bravery in Battle
talents.desc: In combat, 50% of overhealing converts to a shield (accumulated shield cannot exceed 50% of Max HP).

talents.name: Rock Guard
talents.desc: Armor +5%. Each attack of Terra Sunder deals an additional instance of Attack Damage to the target, equal to 100% Armor.

talents.name: Rampart Fury
talents.desc: When you take DMG, Lucky Block reduces DMG taken by 2%, lasting for 8s, stacking up to 3 times.

talents.name: Block Shelter
talents.desc: Granite Fury DMG enhances Lucky Block DMG Reduction by 2% for 8s. Stacks up to 3 times.

talents.name: Sand Block
talents.desc: Successfully Blocking has a fixed 20% chance to gain 1 Sand Crystal. If it was a Lucky Block, gain an additional 1 Sand Crystal.

talents.name: Rock Heart
talents.desc: Every 10 casts of ​Granite Fury​ grant Rock Heart. Rock Heart: For 10s, ​Granite Fury​ evolves into Stone Fist. When Rock Heart activates, grants 10% Rock Bonus for 10s. Casting Stone Fist guarantees Enraged.

talents.name: Granite
talents.desc: After casting Stone Fist, for the next 10s, summons 1 Granite every 2s.

talents.name: Granite Fury
talents.desc: For every 50 Rage generated, summons 1 Granite.

talents.name: Rock Heal
talents.desc: Stone Fist restores 5% max HP. For every 1 extra enemy hit, restores an additional 2% max HP (up to a total of 15%. Excess healing is converted into an equivalent Shield.

talents.name: Rampart Fortitude
talents.desc: While Brave Bastion is active, taking DMG doubles Countercrush DMG.

talents.name: Rage Enhancement
talents.desc: Granite Fury consumes 1 Sand Crystal.

talents.name: Granite Combo
talents.desc: When Granite deals DMG, there is a chance, of which equals Luck Chance, to summon an additional Granite.

talents.name: Intimidation
talents.desc: When Granite hits a target, it reduces all DMG taken by 10% for the next 5s.

talents.name: Granite Fury
talents.desc: Summoning 20 Granites grants Rock Heart: For 10s, Granite Fury evolves into Stone Fist.

talents.name: Counter Storm
talents.desc: For 10s after casting Cracking Echo, trigger 1 Countercrush every 2s.

talents.name: Rock Luck
talents.desc: Luck Chance +5%. Countercrush Crit +50%.

talents.name: Rock Mastery
talents.desc: Mastery +2,500. During Brave Bastion, Mastery +8%.

talents.name: Enraged Rock Heart
talents.desc: While Enraged, increases Luck Chance by 10%.
